summary: Liam 与 Jyll 一致经验:电商出价不能一上来就用 target ROAS/target CPA,机器学习没数据会被限制器卡死,直接零流量。先用 maximize conversions 跑到 30 天内 30-50 单再切目标类策略。Amazon SP 同理:新建 campaign 先用动态出价 down only 或固定出价喂数据,转化数据沉淀够后再切 ACoS 目标或 RoAS 目标。
quote: Start off with like a max conversions for ecommerce and then after you keep getting about 30 to 50 conversions a month over a 30-day period that's when you kind of start to turn on those target ROAS or a target CPA.

title: 竞品对标必须看 SERP 不是后台
summary: Liam 直言:大多数广告投手把时间花在后台改设置,但真正的 ad copy 优化要去 google 实际搜你出价的关键词,看竞品 headline/description/site link extension,然后逐项 one-up。空泛卖点("5 stars since 1973")没人 care,要打用户真实痛点(蜘蛛在房间想立刻除掉)。Amazon listing 同理:打开 SERP 看竞品标题/主图/A+,逐句对标用户搜该词时真实的 intent。
quote: Go out onto the search engine and Google what keywords you're actually presenting on. You want to be looking at your competitors their ad copy and seeing how they're addressing the market. People spend way too much time in the back end of Google playing with all the buttons.

title: 投放是即时出量但盈利要 3 个月预期管理
summary: Jyll 与 Liam 共识:Google ads 开就来量,但 "流量即时" ≠ "转化和利润即时"。新账号需要 3 个月学习期把流量调到目标 CPA/ROAS,前期波动大客户不能慌。Liam 自家 agency 强制 90 天最低合作期 + 100% 退款保证。Amazon 同理:新品/新 campaign 不能拿前 14 天数据下结论,至少看 30-90 天的 trend 再判断要砍要加预算。
quote: The traffic is instant that doesn't mean that the conversions and the profitability are instant and that can take time. Within my own agency we actually have a three-month minimum of people coming on board because people do get scared within those first few months and they see that traffic kind of g

title: Search impression share 失分先看是 budget 还是 rank
summary: Jyll 推荐 search impression share 维持至少 10%,失分时不能盲调,要在 keyword 层级加两列:"lost IS due to budget" 和 "lost IS due to rank"。budget 失分→加预算或砍地理/关键词缩小定向;rank 失分→quality score 太低或出价太低,先看 quality score 再决定改 ad copy / 落地页 / 提价。Amazon 类比:广告位失分先看是不是 budget cap 限制还是出价不够,不要乱加预算。
quote: I recommend your campaign has at least 10 impression share if you're not sure why you're losing impression share you want to add two columns you want to add how much you're losing due to budget and how much you're losing due to rank if you're losing more due to budget add more budget.

title: 高曝光低点击的页面先改 metadata 再说
summary: Kirsten SEO 实操:Google Search Console 里筛 "impressions 高 + clicks 低" 的页面是最容易拿到的 quick win——曝光说明已经在排名,点击低意味着 metadata(title/description)对用户没吸引力。改 metadata 不是长期解,但能立刻把现有排名变现。Amazon 完全适用:listing 已被搜索结果展示但 CTR 低,先改主图和标题(SERP 视觉元素),再去优化更深层的 A+ 内容。
quote: If you go on search console you're able to see what pages people are seeing they have high impressions but they have low clicks. Those are easy wins that is the you fix the metadata for that page. It's not a long-term solution but it will let you start getting more people on your site.

title: Conversion rate × AOV < 2 美元就别投 paid 广告
summary: Jyll 给电商小卖家硬规则:转化率 × 平均订单金额低于 2 美元的店铺不要烧广告,因为这两数据决定了你能承受的 max CPC——CPC 大概率会高于这数字。先做 SEO/organic 把转化率拉上去再投广告。Amazon 类比:listing 自然 CR 低于 5-8%(品类基准)、平均客单不到 20 美金时,SP 广告烧出来 ACoS 必然爆掉,先优化 listing 转化再投放。
quote: Unless your conversion rate times your average order value is at least two dollars don't run ads focus on SEO instead.

title: YouTube 视频广告 ABCD 框架直接迁移到 Amazon Video Ads
summary: Google 自家创意框架 ABCD(Attract/Brand/Connect/Direct):前 5 秒紧凑画面+人脸吸引;前 5 秒必须出现品牌(视觉+音频);用故事/情绪让用户共鸣;最后给明确 CTA 与紧迫感。Amazon Sponsored Brand Video / DSP 视频创意完全可以套这套——前 3 秒钩子+品牌露出+核心卖点+"Add to Cart" CTA,可直接提升广告转化。
quote: YouTube's own framework for creating great ads is called ABCD attract brand connect direct. Attract is about hooking your audience in from the start tight framing fast-paced human faces. Brand is about putting your brand front and center introduce it in the first five seconds.

title: Traffic 不是问题,conversion 才是——先修转化率再加预算
summary: 电商主理人讲述自己 Shopify 店从 0.07% 转化率(near-zero)爬到 1.5% 的实战:她的诊断是流量从来不缺,缺的是转化承接。所以她先不加投放预算,而是上 live chat、reviews、scarcity 等 trust-building apps 把转化率拉起来。对应 Amazon:不要看到 SP 出单不理想就加 bid 加预算,先去检查 PDP 的 main image / A+ / reviews 是否在拉低转化,把 listing 修好再 scale 投放。
quote: Traffic was never a problem for me it was always conversion. My conversion rate i think was like point zero seven or so i mean it was just awful and now i'm i think 1.5 which for not even a year in business is really impressive.

title: Day-1 就装 reviews/live-chat/scarcity——别等六个月
summary: 她的复盘是不应该等到第六个月才上 trust-building 工具,从 day-1 就该铺好 reviews app(社会证明)、low-stock 提醒(scarcity)、live chat(异议处理)。这些 trust signal 各自只动几个百分点,但叠加起来对 conversion 是质变。Amazon 对应:新品期就要规划好 vine 评论、Q&A 内容、A+ 模块、品牌故事,别上完链接才补,前两周流量+评论权重 window 错过了再补成本翻倍。
quote: Have reviews from day one have live chat from day one right start building that connection interest and your conversions. If you're thinking about opening a store put them in from day one like don't wait six months.
